← All tools

Photo Location Viewer

Drop in photos to see exactly where they were taken — read straight from the hidden GPS data (EXIF) inside each file. Map it, export it, or save clean copies with the location wiped.

🔒 100% private: your photos never leave this device. Everything — reading, mapping, cleaning — happens right here in your browser. Nothing is uploaded, ever.
📷 🗺️

Drop photos here

Check what your photos reveal before you share them. Most phone cameras quietly stamp every shot with your exact GPS position, the date, and the device you used.

JPEG photos carry readable location data here; up to 100 at a time.

“Save clean copy” re-encodes the photo, which removes EXIF (including GPS). Slight quality loss.

Tip: photos shared through most messaging apps are stripped automatically — but email, cloud drives and many websites keep GPS data intact. · a max tool
